title: Examples, Delimiters, Templates, and Structured Output · Failure Case: Template Versioning
summary: Stabilize a classification and extraction prompt across varied inputs. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt template versioning increment in a tested prompt template with diverse examples. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Version fixed prompt text separately from variable inputs and evaluation data.
Use explicit schemas and validation when downstream code requires structured output.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
